title: ForgeTorque Pro 3000 — Professional Torque Wrench
content:
The ForgeTorque Pro 3000 detects calibration drift before it causes a failure. ±0.5% accuracy across the full torque range, independently verified to ISO 6789-2:2017. IP68, ATEX certified. Used by Tier-1 aerospace OEMs and 4,000+ MRO facilities worldwide.

Real-time drift alerts. Bluetooth sync to maintenance management systems. Auto-shutdown memory saves last 50 torque readings. 3-year calibration warranty.
excerpt: The only torque wrench with real-time calibration drift detection. independently verified ±0.5% accuracy. ATEX certified.
